chunks.title: Judgment on Ephraim and Call to Return
chunks.reason: A unified oracle condemning Ephraim's deceit and calling for repentance.

chunks.title: Ephraim's False Confidence vs God's Truth
chunks.reason: An argument contrasting Ephraim's self-perception with Yahweh's historical actions.

chunks.title: Jacob's History and Final Condemnation
chunks.reason: A narrative summary of Jacob's origins followed by a concluding judgment.
